name: Herringbone
description: Wooden planks laid in herringbone — columns lean left, then right, while every redraw re-stains and re-cuts the boards.

code.style: --plank: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --len: @rand(108%, 128%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; width: var(--len); height: 30%; margin-left: -60%; margin-top: -15%; background: var(--plank); border-radius: 4px; transform: rotate(45deg); transition: ease 600ms; } } @match(x % 2 == 0) { :after { transform: rotate(-45deg); } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
